home.headline: Hegos
home.copy: Request a private transfer. Receive offers from verified drivers. Choose the one that feels right — calmly, clearly, on your terms.
home.stepsLead: Hegos is not a taxi. It is a discreet marketplace where you define the trip and choose the offer.
home.step1Body: Where we should meet you, where you are going, and what matters along the way.
home.step2Body: Verified drivers reply with price, vehicle and clear conditions.
home.step3Body: Compare, accept, and travel with transparency from start to finish.

auth.loginHint: Demo: cliente@movio.app · motorista@movio.app · admin@movio.app — password movio123

how.title: How Hegos works
how.lead: A private-chauffeur marketplace reduced to the essentials: request, propose, choose.

forDrivers.title: Drive with intention
forDrivers.lead: See open requests, set your price, and grow with verified trust.
